01/03
KSM SPORTS

Crafted In Manila.
Trusted Worldwide.

Hand-stitched sporting equipment built for athletes who demand the best. Made by people who care.

Scroll Down
— OUR STORY

From a single workshop in Manila.
To the world's biggest brands.

At KSM Sports, decades of craftsmanship power every glove, ball, and piece of equipment we make. Our team of skilled artisans hand-stitches each item to exacting standards — combining heritage techniques with modern materials engineered for performance. With two factories in Manila working in close coordination, we deliver consistent quality at the volumes the world's top sporting brands require.

— WHY KSM SPORTS

Together,
we move sport forward.

§ 07 · Admin

Approvals.Approvals · Member Management

—Administrator Only

Pending requests— pending

Approved members— members

Rejected— rejected

Department Management— departments

— assigned
Manage every department in one place — color, code, name, member count, and the Chief / Deputy approval line. Renaming a code migrates affected members, org chart nodes, and gallery items automatically. Chief and Deputy are the first-stage approvers for that department's leave / overtime / meeting requests.

Operations permissions— granted

Grant individual members the ability to approve / reject vehicle dispatch, material transfer, etc. Admins always have all permissions.
